Preventive Risk Tool

Ebola DRC 2026 · SitRep 020 · 3 June 2026 · active-case seeds
Decision support — relative rankings, not probabilities.
Seed window: days

Hover a health zone

Move the cursor over a zone to see its importation-risk profile.
What this is: a transparent, data-grounded watchlist to prioritise surveillance and readiness. What this is not: a probability of infection, a case forecast, or a confirmed transmission route. Importation score is a relative network-proximity ranking; corridors are graph explanations, not contact-tracing. Read importation alongside baseline vulnerability.
